betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Quartz Fiber splits a cable's channel signal to another cable without consuming a channel on the originating cable. It acts as a one-way signal bridge.

Place it between two cable types to share power and data. The Quartz Fiber itself does not count toward the channel limit.

Craft with:
3× Quartz Glass + 2× Fluix Dust + 1× Gold Cable

Tip: Use Quartz Fibers to branch power from a dense cable backbone to individual machines without wasting channels.
